questionHtml: Outline how sex is determined in humans.
markschemeHtml:
1.  genetically determined/determined by (pair of) sex chromosomes/X and Y chromosomes;
  2.  sperm carry either an X or a Y chromosome;
  3.  egg is X and if fertilized by X sperm leads to a female child / XX female
     OR
     egg is X and if fertilized by Y sperm leads to a male child / XY male;

meta.title: Outline how sex is determined in humans.
